headline: Tom, Nina, Asha, Maya set the pace
text: Tom, Nina, Asha, Maya lead on 7 points, ahead by the sacred art of tie-break sorcery. 24 results are in; the table in miniature is 7 points: Tom, Nina, Asha, Maya; 6 points: Owen; 5 points: Sam, Chris; 4 points: Priya, Grace, Ravi; 2 points: Leo; 1 point: Zoe, Ben, Ella. Current chief helpers: Tom/Germany, Nina/Colombia, Asha/France. Everyone is named, nobody can hide, and the spreadsheet is already giving main-character energy.
